message:
fix(costs): store only aggregate data in digest payload to avoid Dolt column overflow

The cost digest was storing all per-session records (up to 2885+) in a single
JSON payload field, exceeding Dolt column size limit. Now stores only compact
aggregate data (totals, by-role, by-rig) in the payload. The queryDigestBeads
function handles both old (per-session) and new (aggregate-only) payload formats
for backwards compatibility.

Fixes: gt-ijiq4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
